raw_consumer_statement:
Ref : Account # XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Disputer # XXXX XXXX After attempting several disputes with returns, Citi requested additional information. Even after providing it, they still did not fully satisfy my request. 
On XX/XX/year>, I called the customer service department and spoke with XXXX. She informed me that I am only allowed a credit of {$170.00} from Citi instead of the full {$390.00}. 
My question is : Since Citi already approved the {$170.00} credit, does't that mean they have accepted my dispute? If so, why did I only receive a partial credit?
